rules.rule: When making changes, run 'pnpm build' to verify no breakage across workspaces.
All tRPC procedures must have: (1) Zod input schema, (2) Explicit return type, (3) JSDoc comment explaining purpose.
After modifying schema: 1) Run 'pnpm db:push' to sync to Supabase, 2) Verify via Drizzle Studio
Use 'use client' directive for interactive components. Keep server components for data fetching layouts.
Use 'const { data } = trpc.feature.operation.useQuery()' for queries, 'const mutation = trpc.feature.operation.useMutation()' for mutations.
NEVER commit .env.local. NEXT_PUBLIC_* variables are exposed to client. All others are server-only.
Branch naming: feature/week-X-description. Commits: semantic (feat:, fix:, refactor:). Push to GitHub, Vercel auto-deploys main.

hooks.description: Verify TypeScript before saving to typed files
hooks.command: if echo '{filePath}' | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then pnpm type-check --noEmit; fi
